Senior AI Product Engineer

We are looking for a senior engineer to ship AI-powered features at the
intersection of product and engineering. You will work with our founding
team to design, build, and operate production systems that use frontier
LLMs as core infrastructure.

What you'll do:
- Architect and build AI-driven features end-to-end
- Run prompt evaluation pipelines across multiple LLM providers
- Maintain shared developer tooling for the engineering team
- Ship public-facing applications that integrate LLM capabilities

What we're looking for:
- 5+ years of hands-on software engineering, with at least 1 year of
  production AI/LLM work
- Strong full-stack capability: Python or TypeScript backend, modern
  web frontend
- Track record of shipping AI products and tooling at speed
- Comfort working across multiple concurrent projects in a small team
- Experience with prompt engineering, evaluation harnesses, and
  production LLM integrations
- Ability to communicate technical decisions to non-engineering
  stakeholders

Compensation: $180k – $230k base plus equity. Remote-friendly within US.
